title: Assassin's Creed Mace Renamed Reskin
description: Changes the look of the mace when renamed to that of a hidden blade from Assassin's Creed if renamed. Feel like you're Ezio, Altaïr, Edward, WHOEVER!
body:
Changes the look of the mace when renamed to that of a hidden blade from Assassin's Creed if renamed. Feel like you're Ezio, Altaïr, Edward, WHOEVER!

THIS ONLY CHANGES THE LOOK OF THE MACE IF IT IS RENAMED SO THERE IS NO DOWNSIDE!!!!

"Assassin Blade" Gives an iron blade just like in the icon. 

"Gold Blade" Gives a golden blade instead of iron 

"Diamond Blade" Gives a diamond blade instead of iron

"Netherite Blade" Gives a netherite blade instead of iron

Old positions can still be used by adding "Back" to the end of the mace's name.

Type "Subsetg4ming" in your search bar to find everything by me!
